mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the housing market signals a strong demand for goods and services, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing market booms are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate signals a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong labor markets are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production index signals a weakening supply of goods and services, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak supply cycles are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP growth rate signals a weakening demand for goods and services, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak demand cycles are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy rate signals a tightening monetary cycle, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening monetary cycles are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the retail sales index signals a weakening demand for goods and services, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak demand cycles are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor force participation rate signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production index signals a weakening supply of goods and services, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak supply cycles are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
